stat_block.craft_requirements: Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells.

abilities.effect:
You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list. 
* **Cantrip** *read the air*
* **1st** *charm*, *restyle*
* **2nd** *befitting attire*, *phantom crowd*
* **3rd** *bottomless stomach*, *shift blame*
* **4th** *befitting attire*, *suggestion*
* **5th** *befitting attire*, *charm*, *glimmer of charm*, *suggestion*
abilities.name: Activate

stat_block.text: A *socialite staff* is designed as an ornate cane, its metal body glimmering with jewels and gold inlays. A sculpture carved from obsidian tops the head of the staff, its design depending on its wielder's taste. Common choices include birds, flowers, or family crests. While wielding a *socialite staff*, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Make an Impression on members of high society.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.

traits.name: Staff
traits.text: This magic item holds spells of a particular theme and allows a spellcaster to cast additional spells by preparing the staff.
